'''鈭歡-f-s''' ('''kagafas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yank|yank]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yank|yank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| kagafas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigafas|thigafas]] || [[word:jigafas|jigafas]] || [[word:shigafas|shigafas]] || [[word:kigafas|kigafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugafas|thuthugafas]] || [[word:jujugafas|jujugafas]] || [[word:shushugafas|shushugafas]] || [[word:kukugafas|kukugafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugafas|thugafas]] || [[word:jugafas|jugafas]] || [[word:shugafas|shugafas]] || [[word:kugafas|kugafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugafas|thugafas]] || [[word:jugafas|jugafas]] || [[word:shugafas|shugafas]] || [[word:kugafas|kugafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegafas|thegafas]] || [[word:jegafas|jegafas]] || [[word:shegafas|shegafas]] || [[word:kegafas|kegafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogafas|thothogafas]] || [[word:jojogafas|jojogafas]] || [[word:shoshogafas|shoshogafas]] || [[word:kokogafas|kokogafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogafas|thogafas]] || [[word:jogafas|jogafas]] || [[word:shogafas|shogafas]] || [[word:kogafas|kogafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogafas|thogafas]] || [[word:jogafas|jogafas]] || [[word:shogafas|shogafas]] || [[word:kogafas|kogafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]] || [[word:gafas|gafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gafas|th忙gafas]] || [[word:j忙gafas|j忙gafas]] || [[word:sh忙gafas|sh忙gafas]] || [[word:k忙gafas|k忙gafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagafas|thathagafas]] || [[word:jajagafas|jajagafas]] || [[word:shashagafas|shashagafas]] || [[word:kakagafas|kakagafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagafas|thagafas]] || [[word:jagafas|jagafas]] || [[word:shagafas|shagafas]] || [[word:kagafas|kagafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagafas|thagafas]] || [[word:jagafas|jagafas]] || [[word:shagafas|shagafas]] || [[word:kagafas|kagafas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagafas|shagafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagafas|goshagafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagafas|gokishagafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagafasn眉|shagafasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagafasnkn眉|goshagafasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafasn眉|gokishagafasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagafassh毛|shagafassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagafasnksh毛|goshagafasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagafassh毛|gokishagafassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafasro|shagafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafasnkro|goshagafasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafasro|gokishagafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafasmu|shagafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafasnkmu|goshagafasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafasmu|gokishagafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagafassher|shagafassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagafasnksher|goshagafasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagafassher|gokishagafassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagafasng|shagafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagafasnkng|goshagafasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagafasng|gokishagafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagafasya|shagafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagafasnkya|goshagafasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagafasya|gokishagafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagafasyam|shagafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagafasnkyam|goshagafasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagafasyam|gokishagafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafasn眉sh毛|shagafasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafasnkn眉sh毛|goshagafasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafasn眉sh毛|gokishagafasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafasn眉ro|shagafasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafasnkn眉ro|goshagafasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafasn眉ro|gokishagafasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafasn眉mu|shagafasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafasnkn眉mu|goshagafasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafasn眉mu|gokishagafasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafassh毛n眉|shagafassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafasnksh毛n眉|goshagafasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafassh毛n眉|gokishagafassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafassh毛ro|shagafassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafasnksh毛ro|goshagafasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafassh毛ro|gokishagafassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafassh毛mu|shagafassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafasnksh毛mu|goshagafasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafassh毛mu|gokishagafassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafasron眉|shagafasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafasnkron眉|goshagafasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafasron眉|gokishagafasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafasrosh毛|shagafasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafasnkrosh毛|goshagafasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafasrosh毛|gokishagafasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafasromu|shagafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafasnkromu|goshagafasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafasromu|gokishagafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafasmun眉|shagafasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafasnkmun眉|goshagafasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafasmun眉|gokishagafasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafasmush毛|shagafasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafasnkmush毛|goshagafasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafasmush毛|gokishagafasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafasmuro|shagafasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafasnkmuro|goshagafasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafasmuro|gokishagafasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
